# CapabilityNegotiation.ServerMethodRequiredCapability method

Returns the capability that gates *method*, or `null` for an ungated (core) method. Mirrors TS `serverMethodRequiredCapability`.

```csharp
public static string? ServerMethodRequiredCapability(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The method name. |

## Return Value

The gating capability name, or `null`.
